heading: Omitted
label: 362 to 364 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 362, , , which related to reimbursement of Federal Reserve banks and branches for necessary expenses incident to deposit of withheld taxes in Government depositories, was from the Treasury-Post Office Appropriation Act, 1956, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.act June 1, 1955, ch. 113, title I69 Stat. 72Similar provisions were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:, title I, .May 28, 1954, ch. 24268 Stat. 144, title I, 67 Stat 67.June 18, 1953, ch. 132, title I, .June 30, 1952, ch. 52366 Stat. 289, title I, .Aug. 11, 1951, ch. 30165 Stat. 182, Ch. IV, title I, .Sept. 6, 1950, ch. 89664 Stat. 634, title I, .June 30, 1949, ch. 28663 Stat. 358, title I, .June 14, 1948, ch. 46662 Stat. 409Section 363, , , which related to reimbursement of Federal Reserve banks and branches for necessary expenses incident to verification and destruction of unfit United States paper currency, was from the Treasury-Post Office Appropriation Act, 1956, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.act June 1, 1955, ch. 113, title I69 Stat. 72Similar provisions were contained in the following prior appropriation act: , title I, .May 28, 1954, ch. 24268 Stat. 144Section 364, act , , , which related to reimbursement of Federal Reserve banks and branches for expenditures as fiscal agents of the United States on account of Post Office Department operations, was from the Treasury, Post Office, and Executive Office Appropriation Act, 1971, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.Sept. 26, 1970Pub.
